text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Mejiro Palmer has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe it's about that time. Ah, but what if
Trainer isn't on board?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(It's fine! It's all about the vibes! I just need to
push on through!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle, rattle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Guess what, Trainer! It's hot spring time! ☆
Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Remember the hot spring coupon I won in that
raffle? I figure it's probably time to use it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You gotta treat yourself sometimes! ☆ Let's take
the local trains there for the scenic route! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: For real? You're down?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Phewww! I was so worried you were just gonna tell me to
go by myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer looks strangely relieved as we
decide to go to the hot springs together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ohhh man! The water was bussin'!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I get pretty beat up when I'm racing, so that soak
was so good for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm glad I worked so hard for this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You too. I'm sure you're exhausted from training
me all the time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Let's take it real easy today. Don't worry about a
thing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I like Mejiro Palmer when she's partying it up, but
chilled out Mejiro Palmer is also nice and easy to
talk to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. I hung up your wet towel. You should
be able to use it again once it dries.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
By the way, you want some tea? If you do, I'll
have some too. I'll brew it now and give time for it
to cool off a bit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, don't you think this conversation feels...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Really weirdly homey?! I mean, yeah, we're on
vacation, but it feels like we're living together or
something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's... not wrong. Neither of us are making an
effort to keep up appearances—we're just sitting
comfortably. Too comfortably...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh noooo! This is a problem! If we keep this up,
I'm gonna get too comfortable and morph into a
major homebody!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This means we're short on vacation vibes! We've
gotta crank this up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer pivots quickly and starts putting a
lot of unnecessary effort into raising the mood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Dinner's her—ahem—look, our room
service's here! ☆ Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Look at all this sashimi! It's so sashimi-y! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And nooow, here's the hot pot! Waheeey! ★
Wanna put the udon and the rice in at the same
time to change things up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of a sudden, our Japanese hot spring inn has
been transformed into a party venue. And then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Look! There's a massage chair!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Now, these are the kinda vibes I'm talkin' about!
Let's turn it all the way up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All riiight! Let's gooooo! Being a real partyer
means being first in line for fun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I know once isn't gonna be enough, so I got us a
bunch of coins to load it up! Time for the wildest
massage ever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's goooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BZZZZZT!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Owwww! This is high key intense!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BZZZZZT!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I can see the other side! Run away! Run away from
the liiight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BZZZZZT!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhhh! The sash on my yukata is caught! I'm
stuuuck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our soothing vacation transforms into a ridiculous
commotion, and our hot spring getaway runs late
into the night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Mejiro Palmer and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
